patch.value: Auto Release fails: pipeline runs dist/cli.js for pm-changelog before any build step

The Auto Release workflow (.github/workflows/auto-release.yml) installs deps then immediately runs scripts/release/run-release-pipeline.mjs, which (after the pm-changelog integration in commits b219aeed/4345920c) calls 'node dist/cli.js install npm:pm-changelog --project' and 'node dist/cli.js changelog generate ...' before any build runs. dist/cli.js does not exist at that point (runReleaseGates builds, but that runs AFTER the changelog step), so the run fails with 'Cannot find module .../dist/cli.js'. Daily auto-release has failed since 2026-05-24 (runs 26353906615, 26387640606). Other workflows (ci.yml:73, nightly.yml:80, release.yml) all run 'pnpm build' first; auto-release.yml is the only one missing it. Fix: add a Build step to auto-release.yml before the pipeline, and add a regression contract test asserting the build precedes the pipeline invocation. pm-changelog package itself is fine (v2026.5.24-15; local changelog:pm:check passes, 825 items, unchanged).

value.author: release-ci-subagent
value.text: release-ci-subagent START: Plan = (1) add a 'Build' step (run: pnpm build) to .github/workflows/auto-release.yml between 'Install dependencies' and 'Run auto release pipeline' so dist/cli.js exists before run-release-pipeline.mjs calls it for pm-changelog generation; (2) add a regression contract test in tests/integration/release-automation-contract.spec.ts asserting auto-release.yml contains 'pnpm build' AND that its indexOf precedes run-release-pipeline.mjs; (3) run the contract spec. Not touching CHANGELOG.md, config.ts, or run-release-pipeline.mjs.

value.author: release-ci-subagent
value.text:
release-ci-subagent DONE.

FILES CHANGED (2):
1) .github/workflows/auto-release.yml -- inserted a new step between 'Install dependencies' and 'Run auto release pipeline':
      - name: Build
        run: pnpm build
   This builds dist/cli.js so the release pipeline (run-release-pipeline.mjs lines ~284-302) can call 'dist/cli.js install npm:pm-changelog --project' and 'dist/cli.js changelog generate' without Cannot-find-module errors. Verified step order is now Install dependencies -> Build -> Run auto release pipeline; YAML parses cleanly.

2) tests/integration/release-automation-contract.spec.ts -- added regression test 'builds dist before the auto-release pipeline consumes dist/cli.js' (placed right after the existing auto-release workflow contract test). It reads auto-release.yml, asserts it contains 'pnpm build', and asserts indexOf('pnpm build') < indexOf('scripts/release/run-release-pipeline.mjs') so the build always precedes the pipeline. Matches existing indexOf style in the file.

TESTS RUN:
  node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/integration/release-automation-contract.spec.ts
  => 1 file passed, 11 tests passed (was 10, +1 new). Build runs first then tests; all green.

NOT TOUCHED (per constraints): CHANGELOG.md, src/cli/commands/config.ts (other agent), scripts/release/run-release-pipeline.mjs (workflow-only fix is sufficient; pipeline assumes dist/cli.js exists, which is the correct contract for a release job).

COORDINATOR TODO:
  - Add CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] line, e.g. under Fixed:
    'Fixed daily Auto Release workflow failing since 2026-05-24 by adding the missing pnpm build step before the release pipeline, so dist/cli.js exists when pm-changelog generation runs (pm-yf8t).'
  - Do NOT close pm-yf8t until PR merges (per instructions).

patch.value: Fix Auto Release failure: build dist before pm-changelog generation runs

value.author: codex-gh-triage
value.text: GitHub triage addendum 2026-05-25: latest Auto Release failure confirmed in gh run 26387640606 on main c036f238. Job installs dependencies, does not run build, then run-release-pipeline prints v2026.5.25 and fails at node dist/cli.js install npm:pm-changelog --project with MODULE_NOT_FOUND for dist/cli.js. This matches the item description; recommended fix remains adding pnpm build before the pipeline and keeping the workflow-order regression test.

patch.value: Merged fix confirmed: Auto Release now builds dist before pm-changelog generation and contract regression stays green.
Added missing auto-release build step before release pipeline and kept workflow-order contract coverage.
Scheduled auto-release runs should build dist and no longer fail at dist/cli.js lookup during pm-changelog generation.
Workflow now builds before pipeline; merged fix verified by focused contract tests and successful post-merge CI.
